hud_day.title: Day Counter
hud_day.body: The current day and time of day. Red means you are behind on your goal. Each day has 16 ticks of action before dawn.

hud_day_progress.title: Day Progress
hud_day_progress.body: How far through today you are. The bar drains as you take actions. When it empties, the day ends and actions refresh at dawn.

hud_win_progress.title: Win Progress
hud_win_progress.body: How close you are to winning the scenario. Reach 100% before the days run out. Spread rumors to shift NPC beliefs and push the town toward your goal.

hud_goal.title: Scenario Goal
hud_goal.body: Your objective for this run. Spreading the right rumors to the right NPCs will shift faction power and beliefs toward your goal.

hud_milestone.title: Progress Milestone
hud_milestone.body: A notable marker on the road to victory. Milestones appear when your rumors have had a meaningful impact on the town.

recon_actions.title: Recon Actions
recon_actions.body: Actions you can spend today to observe NPCs and locations. Each action reveals information useful for crafting rumors. Refreshes every dawn.

recon_whispers.title: Whisper Tokens
recon_whispers.body: Tokens spent to seed rumors. Each seeding costs 1 token. Whisper to well-connected NPCs for faster spread. Refreshes every dawn.

recon_favors.title: Favors
recon_favors.body: Favors earned through successful actions and spent on bribes. Bribing NPCs can shift their beliefs or protect your rumors from rejection.

recon_heat.title: Heat (Suspicion)
recon_heat.body: How suspicious the town is of your activities. High heat makes NPCs more likely to reject your rumors. Lay low to let it cool.

rumor_subject_panel.title: 1 / 3 — Subject Selection
rumor_subject_panel.body: Choose which NPC this rumor targets. Their faction and reputation affect how quickly the rumor spreads and how believable it sounds to others.

rumor_claim_panel.title: 2 / 3 — Claim Type
rumor_claim_panel.body: The kind of rumor you are spreading. Intensity determines how fast it spreads and how much it shocks the listener. Mutability controls how much NPCs distort it as it travels.

rumor_seed_panel.title: 3 / 3 — Seed Target
rumor_seed_panel.body: The first NPC to hear the rumor. Well-connected NPCs spread it to more people. Seeding costs 1 Whisper Token — choose your messenger wisely.

rumor_whisper_bar.title: Whisper Tokens Remaining
rumor_whisper_bar.body: How many times you can seed rumors today. Each seed costs 1 token. All tokens replenish at dawn.

rumor_claim_intensity.title: Intensity
rumor_claim_intensity.body: How shocking the claim is. Higher intensity spreads faster and is harder to ignore, but strong claims may be dismissed as unbelievable by skeptical NPCs.

rumor_claim_mutability.title: Mutability
rumor_claim_mutability.body: How much NPCs distort the rumor as it passes between them. High mutability means the story changes significantly by the time it reaches its target.

journal_rumors.title: Rumors
journal_rumors.body: All rumors you have seeded. Track their spread state, how many NPCs believe them, and filter or sort by status. New activity is highlighted.

journal_intelligence.title: Intelligence
journal_intelligence.body: Observations and eavesdropping data collected through recon actions. Attach evidence to rumors to boost their believability when you seed them.

journal_factions.title: Factions
journal_factions.body: The three town factions — Merchant, Noble, and Clergy. Shows each faction's current mood and how your rumors are shifting their influence.

journal_timeline.title: Timeline
journal_timeline.body: A chronological log of events, rumors seeded, and NPC state changes. Useful for spotting patterns and planning your next move.

journal_objectives.title: Objectives
journal_objectives.body: Your scenario win and fail conditions, with current progress toward each. Check here if you are unsure what to focus on.

journal_milestones.title: Milestones
journal_milestones.body: Notable achievements unlocked during this run. Each milestone marks a meaningful turning point in how the town's gossip network has shifted.
